commands.review_summary:
The branch adds watch-mode checks for missing bundled-plugin dist and runtime-postbuild outputs, copies static plugin assets into `dist-runtime`, and expands run-node/runtime-postbuild regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source inspection shows the clean-stamp path can skip output existence checks, and the PR body supplies live Gateway logs for the missing-artifact scenario before and after the patch.
